name: MARS VR(全球使命VR)
developer: Ying Pei Digital Technology Shanghai Co., Limited
short_description: Welcome to 《Mars VR》. This is an immersive first-person shooting game, which used virtual reality technology to develop for VR platform by Zhenyou Network and Yingpei Games. As a key part of 《Mars》 whole platform strategy, 《Mars VR》 is based on strong technical development experience of Yingpei Games and the new generation of Unreal...
